title: Invoice Approval
description: AP Manager reviews invoice details and approves or rejects payment

manager_approved.title: Approve Invoice for Payment?
manager_approved.description: Select Yes to approve payment or No to reject and return for revision

approval_notes.title: Approval Notes
approval_notes.description: Optional notes about the approval decision

rejection_reason.title: Rejection Reason
rejection_reason.description: If rejecting, explain why so the AP Clerk can correct and resubmit
